forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Patchy morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Mostly clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Nullarbor, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
